outcomes: Understand nature of matter, properties, measurement, uncertainty, laws of chemical combination, Dalton's atomic theory
Calculate atomic/molecular masses, mole concept, molar mass, percentage composition, stoichiometry
Explain discovery of sub-atomic particles, atomic models, developments leading to Bohr's model

learning_outcomes.unit_name: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
learning_outcomes.chapter_name: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
outcomes: Explain genesis of periodic classification, modern periodic law, nomenclature for Z>100
Apply Kossel-Lewis approach, Ionic/Electrovalent bond concepts
Analyze applications of thermodynamics, measurement of ∆U and ∆H
Analyze homogeneous/heterogeneous equilibria, ionic equilibrium in solution
Classify classical ideas vs. electron transfer concepts

learning_outcomes.unit_name: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques

outcomes: Classify and analyze properties of Alkanes, Alkenes, Alkynes
